content.question: The fiscal and pedagogical cost of phase-out or structural reform of Hungary's 8-year grammar school track (replacing it with comprehensive entry and specialist bands at 14+) has not been modeled in published Hungarian research.
content.reduction_path: A scenario analysis prepared by Hungarian education ministry or major research institute, modeling capital reallocation, teacher redeployment, and transition costs over 10–15 years under different phase-in schedules.
